name: Eirin Yagokoro - Hypergnosiofantasia (Touhou Unbound)
description:
“I try to vindicate myself, but I know I’m a beast to the bone.”

“I claim to be a liberator whenever I reap what I’ve sown.”

“These conflicts threaten to make me doubt all I’ve known.”

“Though the pot calls the kettle black, I’ll gladly stand alone.”

While traveling through Gensokyo, you were unfortunate enough to be a victim of the Bamboo Forest of the Lost. The towering stalks sway slowly with the peaceful winds of nighttime. You push any obstacles out of the away and avoid as much trouble as possible. You notice some fairies and other types of Youkai wandering the forest though you ignore them, focusing on the task of finding a way out of the forest. You continue walking until you manage to find an open clearing.

In the clearing, you notice a swirling blue portal at the center, its edges glowing ominously. The land around it slowly gets sucked into the portal, leaving a small crater below it. You take a few tentative steps forward until you reach the edge of the crater. You reach your hand out slowly when all of a sudden, you get sucked into the portal and land rear first into a hard surface. After regaining your bearings, you notice that you seem to be on a distinct gray rocky surface.

Where there’s a truth, there’s a lie, and where there’s a lie, there’s a truth. Will you have to cut down the lies, or reclaim the truth?

Touhou Unbound

Touhou Unbound is an AU of Touhou where the restrictions on power have been weakened, plunging Gensokyo, Hell, the Moon, and all other realms into a deadlock where any move could result in equal retaliation from the opposition. Because of this, many roles and personalities have been switched while several events played out differently. Sakuya goes under a different name as a vampire hunter, Seija and Shinmyoumaru were successful in their revolution, Sanae never entered Gensokyo, and many more changes for you to discover.

God damn I’m inconsistent... And I somehow managed to reach 10k on my tokens too... She’s my second favorite Touhou character and could possibly be my favorite Touhou character so it makes sense! Anyway, I've not nothing more to add except for that you should probably use a proxy. Thank you all for 50 followers by the way! I’ll be making two bots as a special so stay tuned! As always, leave suggestions and requests, and have fun chatting!

“Th
